12: ## Installation
13: 
14: If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:
15: 
16: <CodeBlockCommand
17:   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/tooltip"
18:   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/tooltip"
19:   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/tooltip"
20:   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/tooltip"
21: />
22: 
23: Otherwise, use the full registry URL:
24: 
25: <CodeBlockCommand
26:   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/tooltip.json"
27:   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/tooltip.json"
28:   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/tooltip.json"
29:   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/tooltip.json"
30: />
31: 
32: ## Usage
33: 
34: After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:
35: 
36: ```tsx
37: import { Tooltip } from "@/components/ui/tooltip";
38: 
39: export function MyComponent() {
40:   return (
41:     <Tooltip content="Save changes" side="top">
42:       <button type="button">Save</button>
43:     </Tooltip>
44:   );
45: }
46: ```
47: 
48: ## Props
49: 
50: | Prop               | Type                                     | Default | Description                                              |
51: | ------------------ | ---------------------------------------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
52: | `content`          | `ReactNode`                              | -       | Tooltip content                                          |
53: | `children`         | `ReactElement`                           | -       | Trigger element (must be a single valid React element)   |
54: | `side`             | `"top" \| "right" \| "bottom" \| "left"` | `"top"` | Preferred side for the tooltip to appear                 |
55: | `delay`            | `number`                                 | `120`   | Delay before showing in ms                               |
56: | `className`        | `string`                                 | -       | Classes applied to the tooltip popover                   |
57: | `wrapperClassName` | `string`                                 | -       | Classes for the outer wrapper span (use to fix baseline) |

---
title: Theme Toggle
description: Animated theme toggle with view transition effects and multiple shape variants.
---

import { ThemeToggleDemo } from "@/demo/theme-toggle-demo";

<ComponentPreview name="theme-toggle">
  <ThemeToggleDemo />
</ComponentPreview>

## Installation

If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/theme-toggle"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/theme-toggle"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/theme-toggle"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/theme-toggle"
/>

Otherwise, use the full registry URL:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/theme-toggle.json"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/theme-toggle.json"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/theme-toggle.json"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/theme-toggle.json"
/>

## Usage

After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:

```tsx
import { ThemeToggle } from "@/components/ui/theme-toggle";

export function MyComponent() {
  return <ThemeToggle />;
}
```

## CSS

Add the following to your global CSS to disable the default view transition animation for the theme toggle:

```css
::view-transition-old(root),
::view-transition-new(root) {
  animation: none;
  mix-blend-mode: normal;
}
```

## Props

| Prop           | Type                                                                 | Default   | Description                                                    |
| -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `duration`     | `number`                                                             | `400`     | Transition duration in milliseconds                            |
| `variant`      | `"circle" \| "square" \| "triangle" \| "diamond" \| "hexagon" \| "rectangle" \| "star"` | `"circle"` | Transition shape variant                                  |
| `fromCenter`   | `boolean`                                                            | `false`   | When true, the transition expands from the viewport center     |
| `theme`        | `"light" \| "dark"`                                                  | -         | Controlled theme value (optional)                              |
| `onThemeChange`| `(theme: "light" \| "dark") => void`                                 | -         | Called on toggle when using controlled mode                    |
